name: endgroup
short_description: End a set of commands that can be undone/redone as a group
full_help:
endgroup

Description: 
End a set of commands that can be undone/redone as a group

Syntax: 
endgroup  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
GUIControl

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
